programme.title: 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.sub-title: 2023 - 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.desc: (MA) Featuring Morgan Freeman, this powerful documentary reveals the true story of WWII's first Black tank unit. It explores the major battles they faced both overseas and at home.

programme.title: Man Made Monsters
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: Vanished
programme.desc: (PG) Former detective Dave Paulides investigates extraordinary cases around nation parks. Cases that defy explanation, whose victims are not just missing - they're vanished.
